steps.title: Separate the two sentences
steps.content: The first clause says Gabriele tracks the dissemination of Braddon's works through the magazine Belgravia. The next idea describes that magazine as published and distributed across many cities, then explains how it made Braddon's serialized novels globally available.

steps.title: Avoid a run-on
steps.content: Choice A uses only a comma between complete ideas. Choice B creates a relative clause but still leaves the later main clause awkwardly attached. Choice D gives no boundary at all. A period after the magazine title creates a clean sentence break, and Published begins a modifying phrase for the next sentence. The answer is C.
